# `otp` - database schema slice

Source of truth: [`backend/prisma/schema.prisma`](../../../prisma/schema.prisma).
This file mirrors the Prisma models owned by this feature so the schema is
co-located with the code that reads/writes it. Regenerate via:

```bash
pwsh backend/scripts/scaffold-feature-schemas.ps1
```

## `OtpCode`

```prisma
model OtpCode {
  id        String   @id @default(uuid())
  userId    String
  code      String
  expiresAt DateTime
  attempts  Int      @default(0)
  used      Boolean  @default(false)
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())
  user      User     @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@index([userId])
  @@index([expiresAt])
  @@schema("public")
}
```

## `OtpRequest`

```prisma
model OtpRequest {
  id          String    @id @default(uuid())
  userId      String?
  destination String // phone or email
  channel     String // 'sms' | 'email'
  purpose     String // 'signup' | 'login' | 'reset_password' | 'aa_consent' | 'sensitive_action'
  otpHash     String // SHA-256 hash of OTP (never store plaintext)
  expiryTime  DateTime
  attempts    Int       @default(0)
  maxAttempts Int       @default(5)
  status      String    @default("ACTIVE") // ACTIVE | VERIFIED | EXPIRED | BLOCKED
  ipAddress   String?
  userAgent   String?
  createdAt   DateTime  @default(now())
  verifiedAt  DateTime?

  @@index([destination, purpose, status])
  @@index([userId])
  @@index([createdAt])
  @@map("otp_requests")
  @@schema("public")
}
```
